description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and several mature trees. The structure features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines, large glass windows, and a flat roof. The front entrance is marked by a wooden double door, flanked by decorative planters and a paved walkway leading to a gated fence. The interior layout is visible, showing distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas, with some rooms highlighted by accent colors such as pink and red. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area with flower beds and a green lawn. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by glass panels and wooden accents, creating a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees and flower beds. The design is minimalist with white walls, wooden accents, and a prominent front entrance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a section of the interior layout with visible living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the garden, flower beds, and large glass windows, with the interior bedroom and living spaces visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional trees, and the driveway leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Frontal view featuring the main gate, double wooden doors, symmetrical landscaping, and the approach path.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass panels
